critical_code_review_comments: Cloudinary integration properly configured with fallback to placeholder URLs in demo mode
Image upload validates file type and size (max 10MB) correctly
Video upload validates file type and size (max 100MB) correctly
All upload endpoints properly require authentication
ImageUploader component properly uses data-testid for testing
VideoUploader in Reels modal has all necessary form fields
seed_data_creation: Created test owner account (testowner@gharsetu.com) for Owner Dashboard testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload features fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/upload/image, /api/upload/images, and /api/videos/upload all working. Frontend ImageUploader component in Owner Dashboard CreateListingForm working. Reels upload modal with VideoUploader working. Cloudinary integration configured and working (returns placeholder URLs in demo mode if env vars not set - MOCKED behavior).

mocked_apis.Cloudinary_Image_Upload: MOCKED - Returns placeholder Unsplash URL if CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME not configured
mocked_apis.Cloudinary_Video_Upload: MOCKED - Returns placeholder Vimeo URL if CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME not configured

Backend_Single_Image_Upload.details: Accepts multipart/form-data, validates image type and size, returns URL

Backend_Multiple_Images_Upload.details: Accepts multiple files, max 10 images, returns array of URLs

Backend_Video_Upload.details: Accepts video file with title, description, category. Creates video record in DB

Frontend_ImageUploader.details: Drag-drop area, file size/type validation, preview thumbnails

Frontend_VideoUploader.details: Add Video area, caption, title, category, hashtags, location fields
